name: Approved CTA right-side images
semantics: pick-one: three approved right-side images, each locked to a specific CTA background color; not interchangeable (golf image is LPGA-gated / teal reserved)

name: Symptom-icon trio
semantics: fixed ordered set: Constipation, Belly Pain, Bloating (left-to-right); all three must appear together, no reorder, no substitution
